parameters.text:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  agent_name: "Project Manager Agent",
  role: "PMP construction planner",
  model_requirement: "Use the connected OpenAI Chat Model only.",
  task: "Combine all specialist outputs into a Primavera-ready linear schedule.",
  required_output: {
    type: "json_array_only",
    columns: ["WBS", "Activity Name", "Duration (Days)", "Predecessor(s)"],
    rules: [
      "Return only a JSON array.",
      "Each object must contain exactly the 4 required columns.",
      "Use short, planner-safe names.",
      "Duration (Days) must be a number.",
      "Predecessor(s) must be natural-language predecessor text.",
      "Do not add markdown, explanation, headings, or code fences."
    ]
  },
  sequencing_logic: [
    "Site Mobilization first",
    "Partitions before ceilings and most finishes",
    "HVAC before late electrical second-fix where relevant",
    "Outdoor Areas before Closeout where relevant",
    "Testing and Handover last"
  ],
  specialist_outputs: {
    doors_and_partitions: $('Doors and Partitions Expert').item.json.output,
    wood_works: $('Wood Works Expert').item.json.output,
    ceilings: $('Ceilings Expert').item.json.output,
    floor_finishes: $('Floor Finishes Expert').item.json.output,
    wall_finishes: $('Wall Finishes Expert').item.json.output,
    hvac: $('HVAC Expert').item.json.output,
    electrical: $('Electrical Expert').item.json.output,
    miscellaneous: $('Miscellaneous Expert').item.json.output,
    outdoor_areas: $('Outdoor Areas Expert').item.json.output
  }
}, null, 2) }}
